pi_items.source: task.json id field and setup_task.sh line 106
setup_task.sh line 105 creates employee with this exact name via XMLRPC
setup_task.sh line 106 creates expense sheet with this exact name via XMLRPC

README.md line 60 explicitly lists states: 'draft → submit → approve → post → done'. export_result.sh code uses 'approve' (line 82), 'submit' (line 233), 'post', 'done'. State names are 'submit' and 'approve', not 'submitted' and 'approved'.

privileged_info_summary: Task ID is employee_expense_approval@1. Employee name is Sarah Mitchell. Expense report name is Q1 Client Visit - Chicago. Total expense amount is $1,117.50 across three items (Hotel $570.00, Meals $127.50, Airfare $420.00). All data is synthetic, created programmatically in Odoo via XMLRPC during task setup. The task involves approving a submitted expense report, posting journal entries, and registering payment reimbursement. Note: Metadata claims state sequence ['submitted', 'approved', 'post', 'done'] but actual Odoo states are ['submit', 'approve', 'post', 'done'].
